title: cinnamomum hartmanii
intro: Cinnamomum hartmanii, also known as East Indian sandalwood, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Lauraceae. This plant is valued for its aromatic oil and medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cinnamomum hartmanii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving skin health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the essential oil extracted from this plant is often used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and traditional medicine, although its use may vary depending on the region and culture.
